---
title: "The Link Function Problem"
subtitle: "aka why All Interactions Are Wrong (no, we're joking... but probably a great deal of them are actually wrong)"
author: "toffa feat pippo & the curly one x psicostat"
include-in-header: figures/header.html
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true   
    toc-depth: 3 
    toc-expand: 3 
    code-fold: false 
    message: false
editor: visual
---

<a href="handzone/0.SlideNonGaussian.html" target=_blank>(Non)Normal distributions</a>

<a href="handzone/1.LinkFunctions.html" target=_blank>Examples of <em>link functions</em></a>
